overall.description: Gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character exploring a rustic snow-covered mountain cabin, looting items from inside, then exiting to mount a horse and ride through the snowy landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: rustic cabin interior with stone and log walls

events.description: character enters the dark cabin from the bright snowy exterior
camera looks up revealing wooden ceiling beams and chimney structure

agents.ego_description: walking into the cabin and exploring the main room, examining the stove and furniture

entered.detail: rough-hewn timber doorway with metal hinges
stacked stone walls with wooden log supports
black cast iron stove with tall chimney pipe covered in icicles
simple wooden table with items on surface
exposed wooden rafters and roof beams

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dark, rustic mountain cabin from the snow outside. The interior features stone walls, a central cast iron stove, and wooden furniture. The camera explores the space, looking up at the timber ceiling beams as the character moves deeper into the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: cabin storage corner with shelves and chest

events.description: character opens the wooden chest to search for items
character takes items from the chest and nearby shelves

agents.ego_description: looting the cabin by opening a chest and examining shelves for supplies

entered.detail: large wooden storage chest with metal bands
wall-mounted wooden shelves holding various containers
cooking pans hanging on the wall

segments.scene_description: The character moves to a corner of the cabin to search for supplies. They open a wooden chest and examine nearby shelves, taking items. The cast iron stove remains visible in the background while the table and chair are left behind.

events.description: character opens the cabin door preparing to exit
bright sunlight floods in as the door opens to the snowy exterior

agents.ego_description: walking back through the cabin toward the exit door, then stepping outside into the snow

entered.detail: doorway leading back outside with bright light visible

segments.scene_description: The character turns and walks back through the cabin toward the entrance. They open the wooden door, causing bright sunlight to flood the dark interior as they prepare to step outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered mountain slope with frozen lake

events.description: character exits the cabin onto a wooden porch overlooking a frozen lake
character approaches a black horse tied near the lake shore

agents.ego_description: walking down the porch stairs and circling around the cabin exterior through deep snow toward a horse

notable_agents.action: black horse standing tethered near the frozen lake, waiting

entered.detail: snow-covered wooden railing on the cabin porch
exterior stone walls and snow-laden wooden roof with icicles
deep snow covering the mountain slope
partially frozen mountain lake surrounded by snow
tall snow-capped mountain peaks in the background
stacked wooden crates and containers outside the cabin

segments.scene_description: The character steps out onto a wooden porch overlooking a vast snowy mountain landscape with a frozen lake. They walk down the stairs and circle around the stone cabin through deep snow, approaching a black horse tethered near the shore.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain trail along frozen lake

events.description: character mounts the black horse and begins riding through the snow

agents.ego_description: mounting the horse and riding away from the cabin through the deep snow toward the mountains

notable_agents.action: black horse carrying the rider through deep snow, moving steadily uphill

segments.scene_description: The character mounts the black horse and rides away from the cabin, leaving the wooden crates and stone building behind. They travel through deep snow along the frozen lake, heading toward the distant snow-covered mountains.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the bright, snowy outdoors into the dim, enclosed interior of a rustic mountain cabin. It begins as the character steps inside, moving past stone walls and a central cast iron stove while the camera tilts upward to reveal heavy timber ceiling beams. As the character pushes deeper into the room, the perspective shifts away from the center of the space toward the periphery. The scene then focuses on a corner of the cabin, where the camera lingers as the character opens a wooden chest and searches through nearby shelves for supplies.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the dim interior of a rustic cabin out into a vast, sun-drenched mountain wilderness. It begins as the character turns and walks toward the exit, where opening the wooden door allows bright sunlight to flood the dark room. As the character steps out onto the wooden porch, the view expands to reveal a frozen lake and towering peaks before the camera follows them down the stairs and through deep snow around the stone exterior of the building. The scene then shifts as the character approaches and mounts a tethered black horse, leaving the cabin and wooden crates behind. Finally, the camera tracks the horse as it rides away across the frozen lake, heading deeper into the distant, snow-covered mountains.
